title: cerastium brachypetalum subsp. doerfleri
intro: Cerastium brachypetalum subsp. doerfleri, also known as a type of creeping or spreading cinquefoil, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Cerastium brachypetalum subsp. doerfleri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
